description_long: This object is a single, overripe banana with a pronounced curvature and a visibly mottled peel. The peel displays a mix of yellow, brown, and black hues, with extensive browning and dark spots indicating advanced ripeness. The stem is intact but slightly shriveled, and the tip of the banana shows some darkening and minor deformation. The surface of the peel appears soft and slightly wrinkled, with some areas showing bruising and blemishes. There are no visible tears or splits in the peel, but the texture suggests it is delicate and easily damaged. No commercial sticker or label is present on the peel.
description: A heavily browned, overripe banana with a soft, mottled peel and pronounced curvature. The surface shows bruising and blemishes, with no visible sticker.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and curvature of the banana, with extensive browning and mottling on the peel.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the stem and the narrow tip, with visible darkening and some wrinkling at the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the banana's curve and the darkened, blemished surface along its length.
description_view_3: View from the tip, showing the shriveled stem and the rounded end, with pronounced browning and some deformation.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is heavily mottled with brown and black spots, showing signs of bruising and surface blemishes. The texture appears soft and slightly wrinkled, but there are no visible tears or splits.
